name: Litemax Electronics Inc.
summary: Litemax Electronics Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of LCD panels and monitors in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers industrial computing products, such as embedded box, rugged panel, modular panel transportation PCs, as well as boards and modules; industrial displays, including Spanpixel resizing and square LCDs, Durapixel sunlight readable LCDs, and Navpixel marine displays, as well as custom LCD displays; accessories comprising AD, power, HDMI daisy chain, intelligent thermal control, expansion, and AMIO boards; and AIoT solutions, such as smart display and kiosk module, and AI edge computing products. It serves the transportation, digital signage, industrial, point of sale/kiosk, rugged portable, gaming, marine, and healthcare industries. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
